package rulecoverage

func PositiveBufioReaderMissingForSmallReadLoop() string {
    ruleID := "bufio_reader_missing_for_small_read_loop"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "File or socket reads inside loops without visible bufio buffering."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
